title: Implement downward project discovery
description: Discover project/ directories by walking downward from cwd; stop descending into project/ and project-local/.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented downward project discovery for project/ directories in Python and Rust (no upward walking), updated daemon path tests and added project discovery tests. Tests: python -m pytest --cov=taskulus --cov-report=term-missing python/tests, cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml, cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --tests.
